meta.title: Hindu Vrat & Fasting Calendar 2025-2026
meta.description: Ekadashi, Chaturthi, Pradosh, Amavasya and major Hindu fasting days

vrats.name: Papmochani Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Destroys all sins; ideal for deep fasting and Vishnu puja
vrats.fasting_rules: Full day fast, fruits and milk allowed, break next day after sunrise

vrats.name: Kamada Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Fulfills desires; removes sins of previous births
vrats.fasting_rules: Full day fast; break fast next morning with panchamrit

vrats.name: Sankashti Chaturthi
vrats.significance: Removes obstacles; Ganesha grants wishes on this day
vrats.fasting_rules: Day-long fast, break after moonrise with modak prasad

vrats.name: Mohini Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Liberation from cycle of birth and death
vrats.fasting_rules: Full day fast; no grains, no onion-garlic

vrats.name: Vinayaka Chaturthi
vrats.significance: Monthly Ganesha vrat for removing obstacles
vrats.fasting_rules: Fast till evening, break with modak and coconut

vrats.name: Apara Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Grants fame, removes sins, ideal for spiritual seekers
vrats.fasting_rules: Full fast; nightlong vigil with Vishnu bhajan

vrats.name: Pradosh Vrat
vrats.significance: Evening Shiva worship; destroys sins and grants moksha
vrats.fasting_rules: Fast till evening Shiva puja at pradosh kaal (sunset)

vrats.name: Amavasya
vrats.significance: New moon day; ideal for ancestral offerings and tarpan
vrats.fasting_rules: Optional fast; perform tarpan for ancestors

vrats.name: Nirjala Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Most powerful Ekadashi; equal to all 24 Ekadashis combined
vrats.fasting_rules: Complete waterless fast for full day and night; break next morning
sattvic_food: break with tulsi water next morning

vrats.name: Devshayani Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Lord Vishnu goes to sleep; start of Chaturmas; no auspicious events
vrats.fasting_rules: Full fast, break next morning; avoid meat, alcohol throughout Chaturmas

vrats.name: Maha Shivratri 2026
vrats.significance: The great night of Shiva; marriage of Shiva-Parvati; most powerful Shiva day
vrats.fasting_rules: Full day and night fast; 4 prahar puja; break next morning

vrats.name: Devutthana Ekadashi
vrats.significance: Lord Vishnu wakes up; end of Chaturmas; auspicious activities resume
vrats.fasting_rules: Full fast; sugarcane offered to Vishnu

food_guide.gita_reference: Bhagavad Gita 17.8-10: Sattvic food increases life, purity, strength, health, joy and cheerfulness
